themes: The backlog is heavily Manager-weighted and spans a wide range of multi-location industries—franchise, hospitality, fitness, property management, and travel—suggesting that day-to-day location reporting and workflow efficiency are the most common pain points driving product conversations.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times (e.g., Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential), indicating persistent, unresolved needs that may reflect systemic product gaps rather than one-off questions.

Wait times range from 6 to 358 days, with the majority of contacts waiting over 90 days, signaling a systemic backlog that risks customer satisfaction and retention and calls for a prioritized, tiered outreach strategy based on urgency and account size.
